title: PersonaVLM: Long-Term Personalized Multimodal LLMs
page_evidence_status: page_numbers_available_from_extraction; table bodies require visual verification
key_takeaway: PersonaVLM frames long-term multimodal personalization as remembering, reasoning, and response alignment over evolving user memory and personality.
key_figure_caption: Figure 2: Overview of the PersonaVLM framework with response and update stages.
claim_evidence_summary: Strong evidence for framework and benchmark design; moderate evidence for benchmark gains and ablations; real-user ecological validity and publication status require verification.
transferable_insights: Separate long-term creative personalization into memory update, retrieval/reasoning, and response alignment.
Use multiple memory types to distinguish stable profile, facts, events, and habits.
Evaluate evolving user preference rather than only final output quality.
